title: CDRS Event v0.2
description: A single step in a dispute resolution protocol execution (CDRS v0.2). Adds accepted, state_changed, and rejection_reason to v0.1 fields.

timestamp.description: Block time at the point of this step

context_id.description: Unique identifier for the dispute context (e.g. wf0)

event_type.description: Semantic name of the action (e.g. DISPUTE RAISED)

expected.description: Expected values for TraceEquivalence.t.sol to assert

rejection_reason.description: Error keyword when accepted is false. Absent when accepted is true.

global_total_fees.description: Expected sum of all collected fees

global_total_held.description: Expected sum of all token balances held by the protocol

accepted.description: Whether the action was accepted (:ok result). MUST be present in v0.2 steps.

error.description: Legacy v0.1 field — error keyword (same value as rejection_reason)

dispute_level.description: Expected dispute escalation level after the step

pending_settlement_exists.description: Whether a pending settlement exists for this escrow after the step

escrow_amount_after_fee.description: Expected escrow amount after fee deduction

state_changed.description: Whether the world state changed. Equal to accepted for all SEW actions.

reverted.description: Legacy v0.1 field — true when action was rejected

actor.description: ID or address of the acting party
